buraq_mql5_mql4.configuration.Include4Di: Path to the "Include" folder: MQL4 (not necessarily)
buraq_mql5_mql4.configuration.Include5Di: Path to the "Include" folder: MQL5 (not necessarily)

buraq_mql5_mql4.configuration.CloseME.de:
Close MetaEditor after compilation. (Script) 
If this parameter is turned on, then the compilation time using the script is increased by 2 times.
